{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.TITLE' | translate }}

@if (isCameraOpen) {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.CAMERA_SCANNER' | translate }}
}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.MODE_LABEL' | translate }}
@if (loading) {
{{ 'INVENTORY.LOADING' | translate }}
} @if (errorMessage) {
{{ errorMessage }}
} @if (successMessage) {
{{ successMessage }}
} @if (!loading && scannedEquipment) {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.FOUND_TITLE' | translate }}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.MODEL' | translate }}:
{{ scannedEquipment.model }}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.TYPE' | translate }}:
{{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + scannedEquipment.equipmentType | translate }}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.STATUS' | translate }}:
{{ 'RENTAL_STATUS.' + scannedEquipment.status | translate }}
@if (getNextStatus()) {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.ACTION_PREVIEW' | translate }}: {{ 'RENTAL_STATUS.' + getNextStatus() | translate }}
} @else {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_ACTION_NOT_ALLOWED' | translate: {status: ('RENTAL_STATUS.' + scannedEquipment.status | translate)} }}
}
}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.DEMO_TITLE' | translate }}

{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.DEMO_CLICK_HINT' | translate }}
